name: memoir-codex
description: Git-versioned, taxonomy-structured memory for Codex. Memoir adds branch-aware memory recall, onboarding snapshots, and best-effort lifecycle capture to Codex sessions.

interface.longDescription: Memoir gives Codex a per-project, branch-aware memory store. It recalls prior preferences and decisions, injects store context on session start, and best-effort captures durable facts at turn end.
defaultPrompt: Recall any relevant Memoir context before we start
Remember that this project prefers pytest
